features: RPLY Agent lets you text across all your messages, notes, browser history, and calendar from your own iMessage. Still early but it's getting pretty unbelievable. Turn on ‘Enable RPLY Agent’ in Settings.
Custom inboxes: Create and manage personalized inbox filters
Right-click context menu to ignore contacts directly from messages
Two-finger swipe gesture to navigate between inbox tabs
⌘1–⌘3 keyboard shortcuts to switch between Needs Reply, Caught Up, and Waiting On tabs
fixes: Spacebar no longer gets removed while typing in the reply composer
Regenerating a reply from Caught Up tab now works reliably
Filter menu options now apply correctly without dismissing
Empty inbox state when filtering by channel no longer traps users
Floating overlay now appears consistently when iMessage is open
WhatsApp contacts now show names from macOS Contacts app
Arrow key navigation improved for conversation list
Agent status indicator now shows connection state with relaunch option
Improved inbox tab bar design with extended blur background
